verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.152-160. 1 gap found: v.20b fire/birds timing not encoded. Backfill had wrongly marked v.23-25 as preamble — corrected.

claims.claim: General introduction to 6th house effects (no predictive content)
6th lord in 6th itself or ascendant or 8th -> ulcers or bruises on body

Karaka of relative or lord of such house joining 6th lord or in 6th/8th -> ulcers/bruises to that relative; body-part mapping: Sun=head, Moon=face, Mars=neck, Mercury=navel, Jupiter=nose, Venus=eyes, Saturn=feet, Ketu=abdomen
Ascendant lord in sign of Mars/Mercury aspected by Mercury -> facial diseases
Mars/Mercury as ascendant lord joining Moon+Rahu+Saturn -> leprosy; Moon not in asc + Rahu = white; Saturn replaces Rahu = black; Mars = blood-leprosy

6th/8th lords in ascendant with planets -> disease by planet: Sun=tumours/fever, Mars=blood/weapons, Mercury=bilious, Jupiter=freedom, Venus=sexual, Saturn=windy, Rahu=low-caste danger, Ketu=navel, Moon=drowning/phlegmatic
Saturn with Rahu + 6th lord and 6th house conjunct malefics -> illness throughout life
Mars in 6th + 6th lord in 8th -> severe fever at age 6 and 12
Moon in Sagittarius/Pisces + Jupiter in 6th -> leprosy at age 19 and 22
Rahu in 6th + ascendant lord in 8th + Mandi in angle -> consumption at age 26
6th and 12th lords in exchange -> spleenary disorders at age 29 and 30
Saturn and Moon together in 6th -> blood leprosy at age 45
Saturn with inimical planet + ascendant lord in ascendant -> windy disorders (rheumatism) at age 59
Moon conjunct 6th lord + 8th lord in 6th + 12th lord in ascendant -> troubled by animals at age 8
Rahu in 6th + Saturn in 8th from Rahu -> danger from fire at age 1-2, birds bring evils at age 3
claims.gap_note: Distinct condition (Rahu-Saturn axis) with distinct timing (age 1-3) from the animals-at-8 claim. Mentioned in BPHS1712 commentary but not separately encoded.

claims.claim: Sun in 6th/8th + Moon in 12th from Sun -> danger through water at ages 5 and 9
Saturn in 8th + Mars in 7th -> smallpox at age 10 and 30
8th lord conjunct Rahu in angle/trine from 8th + in 8th in Navamsa -> urinary disorders at age 18 and 22
11th and 6th lords in exchange -> loss of wealth through enemies at age 31
5th lord in 6th + 6th lord with Jupiter + 12th lord in ascendant -> own sons will be enemies
Ascendant lord and 6th lord in exchange -> fear from dogs at age 10 and 19
